text:
Trunk Morty is a Trunk person-version of Morty Smith. He is briefly seen in a hospital in "The Ricklantis Mixup".

Trunk Morty is shown on the CN news coverage of President Morty's visit to a hospital on the Citadel and greeting injured Mortys. Trunk Morty is hospitalized with a damaged arm, held in a sling. He shakes hands with President Morty, which greatly improves on his mood. He shares a room with Crystallized Morty, who also was greeted by President Morty on his visit.
